name: @mozhaiskyi/justtype
description: Start typing anywhere — JustType finds the right input and routes your text. No clicking. No missed shortcuts.

scripts.build:ext:debug: mkdir -p chrome-ext/debug && esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=chrome90 --outfile=chrome-ext/debug/content.js && cp src/manifest.json chrome-ext/debug/manifest.json && cp src/icon.ico chrome-ext/debug/icon.ico && cp LICENSE chrome-ext/debug/LICENSE
scripts.build:ext:release: mkdir -p chrome-ext/release && esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=chrome90 --minify --outfile=chrome-ext/release/content.js && cp src/manifest.json chrome-ext/release/manifest.json && cp src/icon.ico chrome-ext/release/icon.ico && cp LICENSE chrome-ext/release/LICENSE && cd chrome-ext/release && zip -j justtype.zip content.js manifest.json icon.ico LICENSE && rm content.js manifest.json icon.ico LICENSE
scripts.build:ext: npm run build:ext:debug && npm run build:ext:release
scripts.build: npm run build:ext && npm run build:npm:esm && npm run build:npm:iife && npm run build:types
